headline: Nvidia reportedly attracts $85B in orders for debt offering
summary: Investing.com -- Nvidia Corp. received approximately $85 billion in orders for its bond offering on Monday, according to a Bloomberg report on Monday, as the chipmaker seeks to raise at least $20 billion through the sale. The demand reached more than four times the minimum offering amount at its peak.

headline: Nvidia to raise $25 billion, sources say, in first corporate bond sale in five years
summary: Nvidia will raise $25 billion through a U.S. bond issuance, more than initially planned, two sources told Reuters on Monday, ‌as it taps the debt market to increase liquidity.  Investor demand for the bond sale ‌hit $85 billion, one of the sources familiar with the matter said, declining to be named as the plan was still private.  Nvidia was ​initially looking to raise $20 billion, the source had said earlier.
